integration_evidence.summary: Declares repo-local resolution, input/output schema validation cases, post-check fixture output, failure mapping hints, and false runtime/write claims for Core admission/schema validation consumption.
Manifest exposes the GH-102 fixture as a present package asset.
Package lock pins the Core consumption fixture id/version/path with the rest of the local package assets.
Repo-local package index exposes the fixture path without introducing hosted registry, runtime, or write behavior.
